name: Network Sniffing - Packet Capture Tool Execution
description: Detects network sniffing via packet capture tool execution (tcpdump, tshark, Wireshark, Responder, Inveigh), promiscuous mode enablement, and raw socket creation for credential capture.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.name : ("tcpdump", "tshark", "tshark.exe", "dumpcap.exe", "windump.exe", "ngrep") or process.args : ("*Responder*", "*Inveigh*", "*promisc*"))
